highlights: Seo Seoul Museum of Art opened March 12, focusing on new media art with free admission.
Art Sonje Center's 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' exhibition explores contemporary queer art.
Major retrospective of nonagenarian sculptor Kim Yun-shin at Hoam Museum of Art.
'20!2026 Art Seoul' digital art exhibit active since March 16 with '80% guarantee' refund system.
Gwangju Biennale exhibition details and upcoming program updates announced.

stocks.market_sentiment: Cautious; high volatility amid geopolitical tensions and central bank leadership shifts.
key_events: Shin Hyun-song nominated as new BOK Governor; markets monitoring policy implications.
Shareholders' meeting season starts this week; focus on minority shareholder influence.
Semiconductor exports surged in March; market navigates Middle East conflict risks.
Goldman Sachs maintains optimistic year-end KOSPI target of 7,000, viewing recent drops as corrections.
